<size=22>受事件机制影响，该关卡无法在第10列种植植物: <size=22>Plants cannot be placed in Column 10 due to level mechanics!
<size=18>......你是自己融合了一个地刺花盆吗，你要知道地刺花盆是不:
<size=18>... Did you just fuse a Spike Pot on your own?
You should know Spike Pots are not counted towards area calculations. Also, at certain waves,
plants on <color=red>all Spike Pots</color> will be checked for area requirements. I think it's best if you shovel it...
<size=20>受事件影响，此关卡禁用玩偶南瓜: <size=20>Joker Pumpkin is disabled in this level due to level mechanics!
<size=18><size=18>......如果你没听懂的话，这个关卡融合地:
<size=18><size=18>In case you didn't catch that, fusing Spike Pot in this level has no benefit.
Not only does it have no attack power, it also adds another area requirement for you to deal with... Got it now?
<size=18>lol那就随你了，我到底为什么要浪费时间给地刺花盆写这么多提示:
<size=18>Lol, fine, have it your way.
Why did I even waste so much time writing Spike Pot tips anyway?
(maybe just to make the lives of us translators worse)
<size=20>进行面积判定时可能会略有卡顿，请稍作等候: <size=20>Slight lag may occur during area calculations, please wait a moment.
<size=18>tip：小丑爆炸不会伤害到地刺花盆，保护好你自己种植的植物即可:
<size=18>JITB explosions can't damage Spike Pots. Just protect your own plants.
Spike Pots <color=red>DO NOT</color> count toward area calculations.
All empty tiles are treated as having an area of 0.
<size=18>tip：你可以使用南瓜或者花盆这类可叠种的植物来灵活调整面积: <size=18>Use stackable plants like Pumpkin or Flower Pot to adjust area sizes flexibly.
<size=18>如果在第5波前没有进行任何右键操作，游戏将开启<color=#:
<size=18>If you do not right-click before Wave 5, the level will enable <color=#79FF79>compat mode</color>
In compat mode, planting down plants measures the area of specific zones.
<size=18><color=#79FF79>兼容模式已开启</color>\:
<size=18><color=#79FF79>Compat mode enabled</color>
You can plant down <color=#CF9E9E>Omni Pumpkin</color> to view the area of plants.
要求的面积区间会在3~5中抽取: The required area size will be randomly picked from 3 to 5
要求的面积区间会在2~8中抽取: The required area size will be randomly picked from 2 to 8
要求的面积区间会在2~14中抽取: The required area size will be randomly picked from 2 to 14
本关开局就是最高的出怪倍率，你有150秒的布阵时间\n每一大波会出现类似领袖的精:
This level starts with the highest spawn multipiler possible, you'll have 150 seconds of setup time to prepare.
Elite zombies similar to the mini-bosses will show up on huge waves, each representing <color=#000000>Omega Assassin Squad</color>, <color=#00E3E3>Pozeidon</color>, <color=#BEBEBE>Jackson Worldwide</color>, <color=#600000>Giga Football Striker</color>, <color=#FF0000>Queen </color><color=#2828FF>Jill-in-the-Box</color>, <color=#820041>Giga Football Archduke</color>, <color=#5E005E>Abyssal Gargantuar</color>, and <color=#D200D2>Mecha Skystrider</color>. Be prepared.
Remember to view modifiers for the best experience.
毁灭行动小组已支援！: The Doom Army has sent backup!
战车急袭小组已入侵！: The Battle Vehicle squad has invaded!
黑橄榄袭击小组已入侵！: The Giga Football Team has invaded!

快速反应小组准备中！: The Emergency Response Team is on the way!
快反反应小组已到达！: The Emergency Response Team is here!

重装小组已到达！: The Heavy Weapons Team's troops have arrived!
樱桃主力进攻组已到达！: The main forces of the Cherry Army have arrived!
警告！检测到黑橄榄大帅，立即击杀！: Warning! Giga Football Archduke has been detected! Kill him immediately!
黑橄榄部队已入侵！: Warning! Giga Football Striker and his team has invaded!
警告！黑机鱼重装部队已入侵花园！: Warning! Ultra Mecha-nut and it's robots have invaded!
主力战斗小队已到达！: The main forces of The Garden have arrived!!
毁灭清扫5队已抵达花园: The Doom Extermination Team has arrived!
毁灭装置将在5分钟后引爆: The Doomsday Device will be activated in 5 minutes.
警告。由于不可控的入侵事件，花园将在10分钟后引爆: Warning. Due to uncontrollable invasion events, The Garden will be detonated in 10 minutes.
毁灭装置将在3分钟后引爆: The Doomsday Device will be activated in 3 minutes.
毁灭装置已启动，所有人员立即撤离或立刻击杀所有入侵者（种植三叶草）: The Doomsday Device has been activated, defeat all invaders or else all personnel must evacuate immediately. (Plant the Blover.)
重装主力部队准备中！: The main forces of the Heavy Weapons Team are on their way!
重装主力部队已到达！: The main forces of the Heavy Weapons Team have arrived!
丢 人 现 眼：雪原对花园极其失望，即将派遣急袭小组！: EMBRASSING: The Snowfield Legion is extremely dissapointed in The Garden, and has declared war!
雪原方认为没有出动的必要: The Snowfield Legion believes there is no need for them to assist yet.
雪原部队已支援！: The Snowfield Legion has sent backup!
雪原部队已取得联系！请保护好寒冰莲花: Snow Lotus is contacting The Snowfield Legion! Protect her!
在游戏的过程中，将会以事件的形式刷新大波植物/僵尸\n种植机蛋召唤快速反应小组！:
Throughout the course of this level, large amounts of zombies/plants will arrive in the way of events!
Plant down Mecha-nut to call for The Emergency Response Team!
Planting down Pyro Cannon will call for different plants depending on the situation on the lawn. More powerful forces will be called when more dangerous, but they're take longer to arrive.(Press E to view the danger meter, you're in danger if it goes over 60%, and if it reaches 100%......）
In emergency situation, click on the Snow Lily to contact the Snowfield Legion and call for backup. Although, you'd better make sure nothing happens to the Snow Lily in the meanwhile......
外部防线已被破坏！阿尔法军团入侵！: The outer defenses have fallen! The Alpha Assassin legion is invading!
雪原支援仅在植物数低于35且危险值＞60%的情况下可用\n（警告，被铲掉的植物及:
Snowfield will only send support when you have less than 35 plants AND the danger meter is > 60%.
(Warning: Plants that are shoveled and plants that explode will not take away from the plant count!)
Grave Buster can greatly reduced the danger meter!
雪原认为花园没救啦！急袭小组已派遣！: The Snowfield Legion thinks The Garden is done for and has declared war!
部分植物得到了增强或削弱\n手套无cd\n注意，游戏将在17分钟后强制失败\n在:
Some plants have been altered for this level.
The glove has no cooldown this level.
Attention, you will automatically lose this level after 17 minutes.
A Blover seed packet will be given after 10 minutes, plant it to attempt evacuation. (costs 1250 sun, evacuating successfully wins the level.)
Defeating the Abyssal Gargantuar on the last wave also automatically wins you the level.Through coding magic, you can use slow mode to keep text on screen for longer~
If you think this level is too easy, try keeping the usage of plants in the seed slots like Sunflower/Spicicle/Pepper Popper/Hearty Apple to a minimum or none at all.
<size=18>该选项已购买，如果想退出熔炼页面请点击取消按钮: <size=18>This upgrade has already been bought. If you wish to exit the smithing menu, press the cancel button.
<size=18>熔炼铁器非常简单，你只需要<color=#00FFFF>点击<:
<size=18>Metalsmithing is very simple, you just need to <color=#00FFFF>click</color> on certain plants to gain their materials: 
Buckshooter + <color=#00FFFF>Click</color> → <color=#ADADAD>Bucket x 1</color> + Peashooter
<size=18>你可以利用<color=yellow>阳光磁力菇</color:
<size=18>You can use <color=yellow>Solar Magnet</color> to receieve more metal objects.
<color=red>Note: You'll need to fuse a bucket and a Peashooter into a Buckshooter first, then click on the Buckshooter to add to bucket to your count.</color>
It's recommend to play this level on difficulty 3~5. This entire level has set zombie spawns.(It's recommended to play a difficulty 3 or 4 when first playing to familarize yourself with the mechanics.)
<size=18>做得好！<color=#ADADAD>铁桶x1</color>:
<size=18>Good job! <color=#ADADAD>Bucket x 1</color> has been added to your smithing inventory.
Now go back to the smithing upgrades menu, and click the [Bucket Upgrades] Option.
Use the buck that you just got to buy the [Smithing Novice] upgrade.

You'll need football helmets to buy the new upgrades, the smithing formula is as follows:
<color=#FF5151>Football Gatling + <color=#00FFFF>Click</color> → Football Helmet + Gatling Pea</color>
<size=18>超级机械坚果经过改造，目前已不适合给植物承伤防御\n建议将超级:
<size=18>Giga Mecha-nut has gone through some changes, and is no longer fit to take damage for other plants.
It's recommended to place Giga Mecha-nut in your backline. Click it to spend 5 of its health for a bucket smithing.
Tip: Make sure Giga Mecha-nut has at least 5 health before clicking it, or else it will break down.

<size=18>尽全力坚持到60波吧\nuwu:
<size=18>Try your best to hold on until wave 60!
uwu
<color=#00FFFF>更多选项</color>中的<color=yell:
<color=yellow>Complete Level</color> has been unlocked in <color=#00FFFF>More Options</color>! (That's that blue text up there.)
Since the 6 flag length of this level is a bit long, you can skip to the end with this option!
(But of course there's plenty of fun upgrades and mechanics after wave 30 as well, so it's strongly recommended that you stick around until the proper end!)
<size=18>虽然这个关卡有<color=#00FFFF>6面旗帜</col:
<size=18>Even though this level has <color=#00FFFF>6 flags</color>, but you only need to get through <color=yellow>3 flags</color> to unlock an <color=yellow>Complete Level</color> option!
In other words, you only need to complete 50% of this level to beat it, the second half is completely optional.
But of course there's plenty of fun upgrades and mechanics there as well, <color=yellow>so it's strong recommended to play this level to its entirety</color>!
(Tn: And also, I spent a bunch of time translating this so please stay 〒▽〒)
<size=18><color=#FF5151>橄榄头盔</color>的熔炼和:
<size=18>Smithing <color=#FF5151>Football Helmets</color> is like smithing buckets, just that the plant you need to click on becomes <color=#FF5151>Football Gatling</color> instead.
Try to smith as many football helmets as possible! You'll need them to buy upgrades from now on.

点击此选项将会打开一个<color=yellow>技能</color>选择菜单: Click this to open the <color=yellow>Ability</color> menu.

<size=24>Level version: v0.13
Level creator: MirteorShower

Level created with The Super Code Editor.
通知，以下内容由花园议会通过后发布。: Attention, the following notice has been published by The Garden.
由于未知的异常事件感染，花园与僵尸已达成协议，将杀死所有的感染者，包括目前在前院: Due to the currently ongoing infection, The Garden has come to a temporary alliance with The Zombies. All infected will be extreminated, including all units in the front lawn.
阳光已经被锁定，所有植物与僵尸务必保持冷静，任何反抗者都会被视为……[数据删除]: Sun has been put into lockdown. We firmly request that all plants and zombies stay calm. Any and all resistance will be seen as...[CONTENT DELETED]
广播已被****控制，模因增幅器已启动，90s后关闭\u000B（模因增幅器：第: This boardcast is now controlled by ****, genetic enhancer has been turned on for 90 seconds.(Genetic enhancer: Plants placed before the first wave of zombies gain a massive increase in their stats.)(Fusing these plants after the first wave will not retain the enhancements.)
屋主，我是机鱼，你需要我的帮助，同样的，我也需要你的帮助。: Hey, neighbour. It's Gfish. I need your help. Likewise, you'll need mine.
花园已经察觉了你们的计划，我临时封锁了前院的入口，但是我的封锁不会持续太久，剩下: The Garden has already caught on to your plans, I've temporarily locked to entrance to the front lawn, but the lock won't last for long. That's where you come in.
如果你相信我，我需要你们想办法破坏花园的防空与中央控制系统，届时我会协助你们封锁: If you would trust me, I need to you think of a way to hijack The Garden's anti-air and central control systems. In the meanwhile, I'll help you hold the line.
相信与否是你的事，我言尽于此。\u000B（游戏过程中，按R/按信息卡牌查看当前: Whether you trust me or not is your own decision. I'll be signing off now.(Throughout this level, press R or the view mission [yellow text] in your seed slots to view current mission.)
僵尸支援部队......?注意，他们是友军！: Zombie backup...? They're on our side!
警告：发现未知飞行物进入花园并空投大量植物，危险等级：红: Warning: An unidentified aircraft has flown above the front lawn and has dropped a large amount of plants. Danger level: Red.
快速反应小组，解散并重组！: Emergency Response Team, scatter and regroup!
中央控制权限已经被我们拿下了！他们的快速反应小组不会再来了，偿还者部队已经突破外: We've taken over the central control systems! Their Emergency Response Team won't be coming anymore, and we can summon some troops of our own! (Click on that new seed packet that appeared to summon. Can only be used once.)
\r\n\r\n植物在满足任务后刷新，僵尸随时间推移刷新入侵\r\n点击植物查看:
Plants will be given after completing missions, while the zombies will send bigger and bigger invasions.
Click on plants to see your progress on a mission. The glove has no cooldown in this level.
(This level is a sequel to the level: 'Invasion: Backup!')
防空已被破坏！樱桃行动小组进入花园！: The Anti-air systems are down! Cherry team, help us!
这里是机鱼，屋主，你做得很好，接下来我会夺取花园的控制权限，我需要你们拦住僵尸的: This is Gfish, You've been doing an excellent job so far neighbour. Next, I'll try to get access to The Garden's control system. I'll need you to protect me from the zombies while I do that. (Hold on for 3 minutes after planting the Giga Mecha-nut. Click it to see your current progress.)
任务失败......救援组已在路上，和他们拼了！（鱼丸死亡/选择的线路阻拦了鱼丸: Mission failed...... The rescue team is on the way, keep holding on! (let Gfish die/The chosen route stops Gfish)
这一切......结束了：机鱼控制了花园！: It all......ends here: Gfish has taken control of The Garden!
植物支援重装肃杀部队以到达，花园内所有植物应配合进行清理: The Plant-supported Heavy Extermination Team has arrived. All plants of The Garden please cooperate accordingly.
花园已授权启用生物武器：复生自分化型雪爪僵尸！: The Garden has been allowed usage of their biological weapon: The Self-duplicating Snowclaw Zombie!
雪原奇术打击3组已支援:\r\n（破译失败需要等待10s冷却才能进行下一场，破译:
The Snowfield Legion has hidden 3 parts of a secret weapon in the lawn!
(There's a 10 second cooldown after failing a search before you can initiate another search attempt. A successful search take 50 seconds.)
(Press E or the last seed packet in your seed slots to receieve coordinates.)
(The instructions to deciphering the coordinates have been put into the current mission info!)
风与雪，见证我们的史诗！: Wind and Snow, witness our legend!
血与泪，见证我们的终焉\u000B风与雪，见证我们的史诗！: Blood and tears, witness our finale, Wind and snow, witness our legend!
2号装置部署完成！: Part 2 of the secret weapon found!
1号装置部署完成！: Part 1 of the secret weapon found!
破译失败！（移动或位置错误！）: Search failed! (Aloe Alba moved or in wrong position!)
坐标正确，坚持50s！（移动中断保留进度，但是有10s冷却）: Coordinates correct, hold for 50 seconds! (Moving the Aloe Alba will maintain the progress, but give you a 10 second cooldown before you can continue again.)
警告，死亡二十二重装小组已押送【数据删除】进入花园。200s后，死亡将降临，期间: Warning, Zombie Section 22 has sent [DATA DELETED] into the lawn. After 200 seconds, death shall claim all. In the meanwhile, a grave will be spawned every 10 seconds.
魅惑放逐小组已抵达花园！将那名学者僵尸魅惑并使他离开这里！: We have Hypno backup! That Scholar Zombie is the leader of Zombie Section 22! Quick, hypnotise him to our side!
当前任务：开启奇术打击\n按E/点击信息卡牌获取密文，破译密码获得坐标，将芦荟医:
Current Mission: Find the secret weapon parts!
Press E/The get coordinates in your seed slots, Decipher the code for the coordinates, move Aloe Alba to the coordinate then click it and keep it there for 50 seconds. Repeat this three times. (You can also spend 1000 sun to skip deciphering the code. (yellow text that costs 1000))
(How to decipher code: The letters are the X coordinate, and have been put into a caesar cipher.
The first coordinate is a +10 shift, the second a +16 shift, the third +6.
The numbers are the Y coordinate, and have been put through an equation, being the target X coordinate + the target Y coordinate + 5 * k, where k is a randomised whole number.)
Search progress is maintained if Aloe Alba is moved after finding the right coordinate. There is a 10 second cooldown after searching the wrong coordinate/interrupting the search.
当前任务 放逐异常学者僵尸：使用魅惑系列植物将其魅惑，\u000B随后使其自行离: Current Mission: Locate the Scholar Zombie, hypnotise it, and let it leave the lawn by itself.
当前任务\u000B坚守180s！: Current Mission: Protect Gfish for 180 seconds!
当前任务\u000B破解中央控制程序：种植黄金向日葵，并击杀种植时召唤的僵尸火红: Current Mission: Hijack the central control systems: Plant the Golden Sunflower, then kill the Necroflame that spawns 20 times.(ps: If you accidentally feed the Necroflame a fertilizer, then you can get restarting the level~)Hijack the anti-air systems: Fill the 6th column with Cactus Drones.
检测到中央控制程序被入侵，ZPP防御系统已启动: Intruder in central control systems detected, ZPP Defense System activated.
阳光已被机鱼解锁！模因增幅器已被花园关闭！: Gfish has released the Sun! The Garden has shut down the genetic enhancer!
毁灭清扫5组已到达，立即击杀毁灭读报僵尸！\u000B（核弹已开启，90s后将爆: The Doom Extermination Team is coming, kill that Gatling Doom Newspaper Zombie as soon as possible!(The Doomsday Device has been activated, and will detonate in 90 seconds. Kill the Gatling Doom Newspaper Zombie to deactivate it.)

警告，由于花园内的异常情况，已派遣重装二组！: Warning, due to resistance coming from the fron lawn, heavy armour units will be sent!
这里是橄榄-磁力联合部队，完成我们的任务！: This is the Magnetcity Team, complete our mission!
已确定橄榄精锐部队到达现场！: The Elite Football Team has arrived to help!
游玩雪原奇术打击3组线，警告，该路线难度较高且规则十分复杂，破译凯撒密码与加密数: Call The Snowfield Legion for a favour! Warning, the route is the hardest out of the three and includes deciphering a code made out of a Caesar Cipher and maths.Unable to win this route through Gfish.
毁灭清理5组已就绪！在毁灭一切的攻势中保护好机鱼，那是我们唯一的希望！: Face The Doom Extermination Team! Protect Gfish throughout the destruction, he'll be our only hope!
死亡二十二号重装押送小组将被派遣，但是里面那位老者是......\u000B无法: Zombie Section 22 has volunteered to send their ultimate weapon for the attack, but that old man there......Unable to win this route through Gfish.
最正常的难度，推荐绝大部分玩家游玩该难度\u000B不作任何修改: The most standard difficulty, recommended for most players.No changes.
适合新手玩家游玩\n解锁熠熠生辉词条且僵尸血量下降50%:
Recommended for new players.
Sun is worth more and zombies have 50% less health.
相当困难的难度，适用于不满足于普通难度的玩家\u000B僵尸血量增加50%，且加: The hardest difficulty, recommended for players seeking a challenge.Zombies have 50% more health, Cherry-nut Zombie and Doom-shroom Zombie are added into the spawn pool, and the max amount of zombies per wave is raised to 100.
